'''Mon Calamari ceremonial ships''' were [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Starship/Legends|transports]] designed by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] for important dignitaries.

==History==
[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]] employed such a vessel in his trip to the [[Kamdon system/Legends|Kamdon system]], during which the ship retrieved an [[Consular escape pod|escape pod]] containing a number of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 30|''Star Wars'' (1998) 30]] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1998) 31|''Star Wars'' (1998) 31]]
